creator: netchild@FreeBSD.org
text: If it is really started with v11 (it shouldn't, you can validate with "ps -auxwww | grep openjdk17 | grep openhab"... while you look at this, can you validate that all paths which are listed in the output are ok and point to directories or files?), then yes, this could be a problem. Can you try without v11 installed?
